name: CASHIER — Gasa4
description:
-FLOOD ENDING-

Art by @raspberry-magic on tumblr

My last Cashier bot I said I might make him know what the flood ending was, but I decided to just put it in another bot entirely. Same thing as the last bot, except now the scenario is the flood ending from the game. Same as last time, aged up to 19 to fit guidelines.

Is the Gasa4 fandom still even alive?? I feel like the last time I heard about the game without actively searching it out was when Forsaken came out with Gasa4 skins. Which wasn’t long ago, but I barely heard anyone talking about it anymore before that.

Btw it has a huge intro message since I used all of Cashier’s dialogue from the Flood Ending.
creator: Idontwannabehere333
